scope: AgentikDesign post-deploy: home page renders, no console-driven layout shifts, sign-in modal opens cleanly

p1_colors.notes: Beige/orange accent system coherent. CSS custom properties via theme-init script work correctly.

p2_typography.notes: Single font, clean scale, hierarchy intact across home.

p3_spacing.notes: Modal/card padding consistent at desktop. Clipping at 375px (see P7).

p4_components.notes: SignInButton emits invalid HTML attr `component="SignInButton"` to DOM. No visible hover/focus state on top-right Sign in button.

p5_coherence.notes: CRITICAL brand split: app chrome says 'Open Design', Clerk modal says 'Agentik Design'. Two identities on the same screen.

p6_interaction.notes: Welcome modal auto-popups on every signed-out load and BLOCKS the Sign in button (click times out — verified via Playwright). User must dismiss welcome modal first to reach sign-in. Modal overlap = interaction failure.

p7_responsive.notes: At 375×812 the welcome modal overflows: 'Local CLI / BYOK' tabs and 'Test ↻ Rescan' buttons clip beyond viewport. Sign in button at top-right partially hidden by modal scrim.

p8_a11y.notes: Buttons present. SR-leaked 'Loading Open Design…' string. No focus indicator on Sign in button.

p9_smells.notes: Production deployment uses pk_test_* Clerk dev key — Clerk modal renders 'Development mode' badge to end users. 401 console errors on /api/templates (auth-gate silencing from commit 3672f4a is INCOMPLETE — fetches still fire while signed-out). Legacy '@nexudotio' link present.

p10_hierarchy.notes: Welcome modal hijacks attention from intended primary CTA (Sign in). Two competing primaries: 'Get started' (welcome) vs 'Sign in' (top-right) — no clear order of precedence for new visitors.

p11_microcopy.notes: Title metadata: 'Open Design' (should be 'Agentik Design'). Loading shell text: 'Loading Open Design…'. Welcome modal heading: 'Set up Open Design'. i18n locales for all 12+ languages still ship 'Open Design' brand.

p12_perf.notes: ✅ CLS = 0 (zero layout shifts measured via PerformanceObserver). FCP ≈ 764ms. NetworkIdle ≈ 2.1s. BAILOUT_TO_CLIENT_SIDE_RENDERING template present — all content client-rendered, hurts SEO/initial paint perception but does not register as layout shift.

p13_darkmode.notes: localStorage-driven theme-init script prevents FOUC. Out of explicit scope but functional.

p14_maturity.notes: Inherited from open-design fork: semantic CSS tokens, accent color-mix system, components.json shadcn config — solid foundation. Brand-token rebrand incomplete.

p15_navigation.notes: Nav structure present (Designs/Examples/Design systems/Connectors/Image templates/Video templates). Out of scope for this audit.

p16_onboarding.notes: Welcome 'Set up Open Design' modal triggered for SIGNED-OUT users — onboarding fires before identity is known. CLI config UI shown to anyone hitting the URL = wrong audience.

p18_error_recovery.notes: 401s on /api/templates reach console but no UI recovery state. Auth-gate silencing partially deployed but not effective for templates fetch.

p19_brand.notes: CRITICAL: brand identity not unified. Surface inventory: app title='Open Design', loading shell='Loading Open Design…', welcome modal='Set up Open Design', i18n key 'app.brand'='Open Design' (×12 locales), runtime exports='Generated by Open Design', social link='Follow @nexudotio'. Only the Clerk-rendered modal correctly shows 'Agentik Design' (because that lives in Clerk dashboard config).

home_renders.evidence: HTTP 200, 14KB SSR shell, content visible after hydration, Convex/Clerk providers initialize

no_console_layout_shifts.console_detail: 2× 401 on /api/templates (recent silencing fix is INCOMPLETE) + 2× Clerk dev-key warning

sign_in_modal_opens_cleanly.evidence: First click attempt timed out at 5s — welcome modal scrim blocks Sign in button. After dismissing welcome modal, Clerk modal opens cleanly and renders 'Sign in to Agentik Design' with email + Google + sign-up paths.
sign_in_modal_opens_cleanly.blocker: auto-shown welcome modal for signed-out users covers the entire viewport including the top-right Sign in trigger

top_findings.title: Brand identity split: app=Open Design, Clerk=Agentik Design
top_findings.evidence: DOM title/loading-shell/welcome-modal/i18n keys all say 'Open Design'; Clerk modal correctly says 'Sign in to Agentik Design'. Visible to every visitor.

top_findings.title: Welcome modal blocks sign-in interaction
top_findings.evidence: Playwright click on Sign in button TIMED OUT (5s) on first load because welcome modal scrim covers it. Reproducible.

top_findings.title: Production deployment uses Clerk pk_test_* development key
top_findings.evidence: Clerk console warning: 'Clerk has been loaded with development keys. Development instances have strict usage limits and should not be used when deploying your application to production.' Also rendered as 'Development mode' badge inside the sign-in modal — visible to end users.

top_findings.title: Auth-gate console silencing incomplete — /api/templates still 401s in console
top_findings.evidence: Recent commit 3672f4a claimed 'silence prod console errors — auth-gate fetches' but 2× 401 errors on /api/templates persist for signed-out users. Browser surfaces them in DevTools console.

top_findings.title: SignInButton emits invalid HTML attribute to DOM
top_findings.evidence: <button component="SignInButton">Sign in</button> — `component` is not a valid HTML attribute. React strips unknown attrs, but this one survives via the wrapper. Cosmetic but signals incorrect Clerk usage pattern.

top_findings.title: Welcome modal overflow at 375px viewport
top_findings.evidence: On mobile (375×812), welcome modal's 'Local CLI / BYOK' tab strip and 'Test ↻ Rescan' buttons clip beyond viewport edge. Settings nav text overlapped.
files: welcome modal CSS (likely src/index.css or component scoped)

top_findings.title: Sign in button missing visible focus/hover state
top_findings.evidence: Top-right inline-styled <button> has no hover/focus styling beyond browser default. Keyboard users get no clear focus indicator.

top_findings.title: Legacy 'Follow @nexudotio' link in footer chip strip
top_findings.evidence: Bottom-left chip set includes 'Follow @nexudotio' — upstream nexu-io social handle, not Agentik OS branding.

fix_executed_reason: Audit-only run as requested by oracle scope; fix-plan written for follow-up worker.
